text:
Blu Uranus and Nero Pegaso blend seamlessly, creating an astonishing visual effect on this Lamborghini Revuelto.

The horizontal fading is enhanced by liveries and engine bonnet details in Giallo Solis, perfectly matching the brake calipers.

Inside, the Unicolor Leather & Corsa Tex in Nero Ade is accented with Giallo Taurus details, echoing the exterior elements.

Customized through the #AdPersonam program.

#Lamborghini #Revuelto #FromNowOn
_
Revuelto: Combined fuel consumption [l/100km]: 11.86 Combined CO2 emissions [g/km]: 276 Combined power consumption [kWh/100km]: 10.1 Combined CO2 efficiency class: G Combined fuel consumption with discharged battery [l/100km]: 17.8 CO2 efficiency class with discharged battery: G

The night sharpens every edge. Lamborghini Urus SE makes its presence impossible to ignore.

#Lamborghini #UrusSE

We celebrate Made in Italy with every Lamborghini born in Sant’Agata Bolognese: from our homeland to the roads, a symbol of Italian excellence, design, passion and craftsmanship.

#Lamborghini #madeinitaly🇮🇹 #madeinitalyday

Featuring a fighter jet-inspired design and a 650 hp naturally aspirated V12, Reventón Roadster, presented in 2009, was the first few off roadster ever produced by Lamborghini, with only 15 units ever made.
A true pioneer of radical exclusivity.
The first step of a journey that begins here and builds toward something even greater.

#Lamborghini #reventón

The timeless elegance of Lamborghini Miura comes alive in its sculpted details.

#Lamborghini #Miura

A streak of Verde Citrea, impossible to ignore wherever it moves. Swipe through and surrender to the magnetic allure of Lamborghini Revuelto.

Courtesy of: @phpicsphotography 

#Lamborghini #Revuelto #FromNowOn

Road-born, track-bred. Temerario GT3 is the racing twin of our latest super sports car. Sharing the same DNA of sharp lines and athletic proportions, it evolves the road car’s essence into a stripped-down, non-hybrid legend engineered for the track. 
Watch Mitja Borkert’s full design breakdown on YouTube now!

#Lamborghini #Temerario #YouCanHideWhoYouAre

This Urus SE redefines its character through a horizontal fading crafted by #AdPersonam.

Nero Helene and Arancio Eclipse merge seamlessly, amplifying its visual dynamism. The darker upper section in Nero Helene enhances the contrast between surfaces, enhancing its balanced proportions and dynamic presence.

Inside, the Unicolor Leather interior is defined by X-stitching in Arancio Eclipse and Performante trim on sets, creating a bold contrast.

#Lamborghini #UrusSE
–

Spring season vibes come alive with this Lamborghini Temerario in Verde Agave.

The Alleggerita Package enhances its sporty character, while the dedicated Bronzo livery makes a distinctive style statement. 

Inside, a bold contrast between Nero Ade leather and Verde Fauns accents defines the cockpit.

Unmistakably #AdPersonam
